first_run.rationale: The scores are identical (3/10), and the core reasoning for the low score is consistent across both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the three primary mismatches: seniority (senior vs. junior role), language (basic vs. strong German), and primary tech stack (TypeScript/DLang vs. Java). The minor differences in wording and phrasing in the strengths and concerns sections are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the substantive assessment of the candidate.
